query:
INSERT INTO users (username, password, name, role, status) VALUES 
('reseller', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcg7b3XeKeUxWdeS86E36P4/1Pq', 'Reseller User', 'reseller', 'active'),
('customer', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcg7b3XeKeUxWdeS86E36P4/1Pq', 'Customer User', 'customer', 'active')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE password = VALUES(password);
